rows.description: Solvta Varia
rows.notes: Selected Extractor 'gemini-flash' (GF) description as 'Solvta Varia' is visually clearer than 'Sobota Paria'. Both agree on row type and no amounts.

rows.description: Account Dinners
rows.notes: Visually, 'Account Dinners' is a header, not an entry with an amount. Extractor 'gpt-5-mini' (GM) correctly identified it as a header with no direct amount. Used GF's description for 'Dinners' (plural) as it's more accurate.

rows.description: Wine
rows.notes: Amounts (0£ 15s 0d) are in consensus. Used GM's description 'Wine' as it does not embed the numeric value, aligning with standard ledger extraction for separate columns.
rows.english_description: Purchase of wine for college dinners.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Purchase of wine for college dinners, amounting to £0 15s 0d.

rows.description: Account Dinners Total
rows.notes: This row represents the explicit total '03 05 00' written next to the bracket. Extractor GM correctly identified this as a 'total' row with these amounts. GF missed this distinct row, misattributing its amount (and misreading it as 3£ 8s 0d) to the 'Account Dinners' header. This row was added as it was missing from GF.
